attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
1 AS BATCH_ID,
CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.BATCH_SOURCE_ID,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,

 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.END_DATE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.FOB_POINT_RULE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.GL_DATE_PERIOD_RULE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.INVALID_LINES_RULE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.INVALID_TAX_RATE_RULE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.INVENTORY_ITEM_RULE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.INVOICING_RULE_RULE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.MEMO_REASON_RULE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.REV_ACC_ALLOCATION_RULE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.SALESPERSON_RULE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.SALES_CREDIT_RULE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_RULE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.SALES_TERRITORY_RULE,

 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.SHIP_CONTACT_RULE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.SHIP_CUSTOMER_RULE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.SHIP_VIA_RULE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.SOLD_CUSTOMER_RULE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.START_DATE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.TERM_RULE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.UNIT_OF_MEASURE_RULE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE11,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE12,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE13,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE14,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE15,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.CUSTOMER_BANK_ACCOUNT_RULE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.MEMO_LINE_RULE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.RECEIPT_METHOD_RULE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.RELATED_DOCUMENT_RULE,

 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.COPY_DOC_NUMBER_FLAG,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.DEFAULT_REFERENCE,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.COPY_INV_TIDFF_TO_CM_FLAG,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.RECEIPT_HANDLING_OPTION,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.ALLOW_DUPLICATE_TRX_NUM_FLAG,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.LEGAL_ENTITY_ID,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.GEN_LINE_LEVEL_BAL_FLAG,
 CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.PAYMENT_DET_DEF_HIERARCHY,
CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME
 , 'CDC' AS GLOBAL_NAME
 , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as CREATE_DATETIME
 , 'I' AS  ACTION_CODE
FROM
( 
 SELECT * FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL
WHERE
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate'
AND ORG_ID IS NOT NULL
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY BATCH_SOURCE_ID ,ORG_ID  ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1
)CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL
WHERE CDC_RA_BATCH_SOURCES_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
